title: Design System: ABE Education — Course Pages

display.purpose: The single hero H1 per page. Archivo, tight negative tracking.

title.purpose: Card and sub-section H3s; FAQ and price figures.

body.purpose: Reading copy in DM Sans; lede steps up to 19px.

label.purpose: All micro-type: eyebrows, keys, captions, source lines. DM Mono uppercase, wide tracking.

extensions.shadowsNote: The system is flat by doctrine. No box-shadow vocabulary exists. Depth is built from 1px hairline rules, a tonal paper ground ramp, and a single 2px hover lift. The only blur is a functional backdrop-filter on the sticky header/CTA strip for legibility.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Color/border state changes on links and nav.

motion.name: state
motion.purpose: Default button and card state transitions.

motion.name: hover-lift
motion.purpose: The only elevation cue: interactive cards raise 2px on hover, border darkening to ink.

components.name: Eyebrow
components.description: The signature section-opening label: mono uppercase with a leading maroon hairline dash. Opens nearly every section.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; font-family:'DM Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size:11px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:.18em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#6e6e6e; } .ds-eyebrow::before { content:''; width:18px; height:1px; background:#800000; flex:none; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Ink-grounded primary CTA that fills maroon on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; background:#1a1a1a; color:#ffffff; font-family:'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:16px; padding:14px 26px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none; transition:background .18s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#800000; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #800000; outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outline button; border darkens to ink on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; background:transparent; color:#1a1a1a; font-family:'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:16px; padding:13px 24px; border:1px solid #d4d6da; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none; transition:border-color .18s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color:#1a1a1a; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #800000; outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Glance Stat Card
components.description: Flat, hairline-bordered stat card: mono key, Archivo figure, body note. The mono-to-display-to-body pattern that repeats across the system.
components.html: Price$179GST-free. The permit fee is separate.
components.css: .ds-card-glance { border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:6px; padding:32px; background:#ffffff; } .ds-card-glance .g-k { display:block; font-family:'DM Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.14em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#6e6e6e; margin-bottom:12px; } .ds-card-glance .g-v { display:block; font-family:'Archivo', sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:28px; letter-spacing:-.02em; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; color:#1a1a1a; margin-bottom:6px; } .ds-card-glance .g-n { font-family:'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size:14px; color:#4a4a4a; }

components.name: Verified Source Line
components.description: The trust device: a dashed-top mono line with verify-blue ticks and dated citation links. Ends every government-fact block.
components.html: ✓ Verified QBCC fee $477.47, current 2026. Source: QBCC, 2 Jun 2026
components.css: .ds-verified { margin-top:32px; padding-top:16px; border-top:1px dashed #d4d6da; font-family:'DM Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size:12px; line-height:1.6; letter-spacing:.02em; color:#6e6e6e; max-width:80ch; } .ds-verified .tick { color:#2f5d8c; font-weight:500; } .ds-verified .src a { color:#2f5d8c; text-decoration:none; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(47,93,140,.3); } .ds-verified .src a:hover { border-color:#2f5d8c; }

components.name: FAQ Item
components.description: Bordered details/summary row; Archivo summary with a maroon plus-mark that rotates to a cross when open.
components.html:
Do I need a White Card too? +
If you will be on site, yes. It bundles with the course.
components.css: .ds-faq { border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:8px; background:#ffffff; overflow:hidden; } .ds-faq summary { list-style:none; cursor:pointer; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:center; padding:20px 24px; font-family:'Archivo', sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:18px; color:#1a1a1a; transition:background .15s ease; } .ds-faq summary::-webkit-details-marker { display:none; } .ds-faq summary:hover { background:#fafafa; } .ds-faq .pm { flex:none; color:#800000; font-size:20px; line-height:1; transition:transform .2s ease; } .ds-faq details[open] summary .pm { transform:rotate(45deg); } .ds-faq .ans { padding:0 24px 22px; font-family:'DM Sans', sans-serif; color:#4a4a4a; font-size:16px; max-width:68ch; }

narrative.overview: A quality Australian broadsheet rebuilt for the web: authoritative, editorial, and evidence-led. It carries its trust in the open, with monospace captions, dated source lines, and named expert bylines. Structurally it is flat and print-like; depth comes from hairline rules and tonal paper grounds, not shadow or gloss. One deep maroon does all the accent work and is spent sparingly, so it always means something; a separate steel blue is reserved only for marking a fact as sourced and verified. Type is a three-voice pairing: Archivo for headlines and figures, DM Sans for reading, DM Mono in wide-tracked uppercase for every label and caption. It rejects the SaaS-marketing look (soft shadows, gradient heroes, glassy cards) and the opposite cold-govtech trap alike.
keyCharacteristics: Flat by default: 1px hairline rules and tonal grounds carry structure, never shadow.
One maroon accent, spent at 10% or less, so it always signifies.
A dedicated verify-blue that appears only on sourced, dated facts.
Monospace uppercase for all micro-type: eyebrows, keys, captions, source lines.
Generous vertical rhythm (up to 112px section padding) and tabular figures on every number.

rules.name: The One Maroon Rule
rules.body: Maroon is the only brand accent and never covers more than roughly 10% of a screen. For marks, ticks, hovers, and active states, never large fills or section backgrounds. Dark sections use Ink as the ground and Gold as the accent.

rules.name: The Verify-Blue Rule
rules.body: #2f5d8c is reserved exclusively for sourced-and-dated facts and their citations. Forbidden as a decorative or interface colour. Blue on this site is a promise that a claim is backed.

rules.name: The Mono Label Rule
rules.body: Every piece of micro-type, eyebrows, keys, captions, meta, verified lines, is DM Mono in uppercase with 0.08em to 0.18em tracking. Archivo and DM Sans are never used for labels; DM Mono is never used for reading copy.

rules.name: The Tabular Figure Rule
rules.body: Every price, statistic, and figure carries font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums so columns and repeated numbers align and never jitter.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Structure is carried by 1px rules and tonal grounds, never by drop shadows. A box-shadow on any surface reads as a foreign object and is prohibited.

dos: Do build depth from 1px hairline rules (#e5e7eb, #d4d6da) and the tonal ground ramp (#ffffff to #fafafa to #f7f4ef to #1a1a1a).
Do set every label, key, caption, and source line in DM Mono uppercase, tracked 0.08em to 0.18em.
Do keep Regulator Maroon (#800000) to 10% or less: eyebrow dash, ticks, hovers, active underlines, brand tile.
Do reserve Verify Blue (#2f5d8c) strictly for sourced, dated facts and their citations.
Do put tabular-nums on every price and statistic.
Do give sections room: up to 112px vertical padding, easing to 64px on mobile.
Do use Ink (#1a1a1a) for text and dark grounds; on ink sections, switch the accent to Attestation Gold (#d4a843).
donts: Don't use box-shadows for elevation anywhere. The system is flat; a drop shadow reads as a 2014 app and is prohibited.

Don't use the maroon left-stripe answer capsule (border-left: 3px solid var(--maroon)). A colored side-stripe over 1px is a banned anti-pattern; rework as a full 1px border, a background tint alone, or a leading mono marker.
Don't set eyebrows or labels in Archivo or DM Sans. Micro-type is DM Mono only; DM Mono is never used for reading copy.
Don't spend maroon on large surfaces or section backgrounds. Dark sections are Ink-grounded with Gold accents.
Don't introduce pure #000 or #fff for text or borders; use the Ink and Rule tokens.
Don't use em dashes, or the word 'comprehensive', in any copy (house style).
Don't nest cards or stack borders. If a card needs internal grouping, use rules and spacing, not a second card.
